projects.name: Holdet TDF bot
projects.goal: Autonomously field the optimal holdet.dk Tour de France 2026 team every single day and beat the human field — hands-off, with only a human veto.
projects.note: Pre-Tour: stage 1 startlist still pending, so the daily brains correctly report 'no material change'. Watch for Tour start.

projects.name: Personal stock dashboard
projects.goal: A calm, trust-first decision instrument that tells me — in one glance — the single sized move my broker never would, and honestly says 'do nothing' when that's right.
projects.lastPublishSubject: refactor: unify duplicated helpers into one home and delete dead code

projects.name: Alexanders Brief
projects.goal: Publish a trustworthy, beautifully-edited Danish morning brief every day before 06:40 — sharper and broader than any single newspaper.

projects.name: Routine Overview
projects.goal: Hold the whole picture across every routine and interrupt Alexander only when something genuinely needs him.

routines.name: Routine secretary (this)

routines.name: Overview self-improve
routines.does: Ships one low-risk, high-reward maintenance/design improvement to this overview per run (or nothing), toward the Anthropic aesthetic.
